items.caption_text:
When I first shared our daughters’ playhouse, we received endless feedback, with some choice words on the exterior.

The truth is, the outside was only the beginning. Inside is where the magic, soft color, and childhood dreams were always meant to come to life. 🌷🦋☁️ 

Let’s decorate the (play)house we built for our kids! 🏠🐛
#design #homedecor #girlmom #transformation #parenting

items.caption_text:
I always thought my life before social media might not be interesting enough to share, but now as a mother putting in to practice what I have learned from my former career, I think it might be of service. 

My philosophy might not be for everyone, but if you resonate, let me know if you’d like for me to make this a series. 

#parenting #girlmom #parenthood #toddler #gentleparenting

items.caption_text:
When selecting outfits for my debut television show (8 years after my last time on set), a lot looked different & everything had to feel intentional. Here are some of the looks that didn’t make the cut. 

As we wrap production of my new show, @hostedbynabela, I thought I’d share some behind the scenes as I tackle styling my looks completely on my own. 

Documenting my journey in discovering my personal style has been so special. I am forever thankful for this space that feels like a giant FaceTime with friends. Grateful for you 🫂

#midsizefashion #ootd #plussize #fashion

There’s nothing quite like the thrill of finding a treasure at a steal. I’ve cracked the code on sourcing high end pieces on Marketplace, and today I’m sharing my guide to bargain hunting on FB Marketplace. My favorite keywords and tips to optimize your time as you search for treasures. No gatekeeping here!

Comment below for a Part 2 and for more videos like this. 🤎

#homedecor #thrift #antique #marketplace #sale

items.caption_text:
I’m in the process of transforming the grounds of my 114-year-old estate, starting with our side porch.

I have been eager to breathe life into this space, and make it a place for gathering and slowing down. 

This is where our mornings will start, where the girls will run through the magnolias, and where this next chapter of the garden begins. 🤍

#design #interiors #transformation #homedecor #diy

items.caption_text:
Nabela Noor’s daughter Amalia only just turned 4 years old, but she’s already showing she inherited the party-planning instincts of her mom.

The proud parent recently threw her eldest child a birthday party that paid homage to many of Amalia’s favorite things and her big imagination. It also gave her the perfect opportunity to enjoy her new custom-built playhouse, which Noor tells PEOPLE was recently installed in their family backyard. Read the full story in our bio link. | 📷: Courtesy of Nabela Noor

items.caption_text:
Slow mornings. Intentional movement. A little lift. Upneeq for low-lying eyelids fits seamlessly into my morning routine. Upneeq.com #Upneeq #ad #sponsored

Upneeq® (oxymetazoline hydrochloride ophthalmic solution), 0.1% is a prescription eyedrop used to treat acquired blepharoptosis (low-lying eyelids) in adults. ​

If you have drooping eyelid(s), talk to your doctor about your medical history, symptoms, and other medications you are taking. Drooping lids can be caused by other serious conditions of the eye, brain, and nerves, such as stroke. If you have heart disease, blood pressure or blood flow issues, or risk for angle-closure glaucoma, use care when taking Upneeq and call your doctor if your condition gets worse. ​

Each Upneeq vial is for one-time use. Use as directed and discard after use. Do not touch the tip of the vial to your eye or other surface.​
 
For additional Important Safety Information and Full Prescribing Information, visit link in @upneeq bio. ​

Paid partnership with RVL Pharmaceuticals.

items.caption_text:
From a girl learning in her kitchen to becoming the first South Asian to host a lifestyle show for a major network. 🥲

This moment is bigger than me.
And it started with simply trying.

Let this be your sign to simply try. 

Hosted by Nabela Noor
May 20th on @Tubi 🤎

raw.caption:
From a girl learning in her kitchen to becoming the first South Asian to host a lifestyle show for a major network. 🥲

This moment is bigger than me.
And it started with simply trying.

Let this be your sign to simply try. 

Hosted by Nabela Noor
May 20th on @Tubi 🤎

items.caption_text:
Baba, we made history. 🥹 For years, I’ve shared little pockets of peace from my home… never imagining they would one day become something bigger.

Today, I’m so honored to share that I will be hosting my very own lifestyle series, Hosted by Nabela Noor, premiering May 20 on @Tubi 🤍

To be the first South Asian to host a lifestyle show for a major network is something I don’t take lightly.

This show is an invitation into my world - from the kitchen, to the garden, to the table…
and all the beauty in between.

It’s about romanticizing the everyday,
gathering with intention and creating a life that feels as beautiful as it looks.

And for little me, who never saw herself reflected in spaces like this… as the daughter of Bangladeshi immigrants who came to this country with everything to hope for and everything to build… this moment means the world.

To do this alongside my sister, @NeharikaNoor who is directing the show & producing it in-house as a family is the gift of a lifetime, and I know my Baba wouldn’t have wanted it any other way. 

This wouldn’t have been possible without God, the support of my family and every single one of you. 

I hope when you watch, you feel inspired to celebrate your life in the smallest, most meaningful ways and to treat every day like a special occasion. 

I can’t wait to host you.👒

items.caption_text:
Let’s host a Fourever After Garden Party for Amalia🌷 

A whimsical little world filled with flowers, food, play and so much love for our sweet birthday girl. 

Celebrations like these are truly beyond my wildest dreams. But a constant has remained since I was a little girl - gatherings filled with children laughing and our dearest loved ones breaking bread together. I’ll never take that for granted. 🤍

Florals, @_backyardblooms_ 
Cookie Cake: @milkandcookiecakes 
Playset: @kingswingsplay 

Hosted, by yours truly 🤭

#pocketsofpeace #girlmom #birthday #host #gardenparty

items.caption_text:
I built a house for my kids 🤭 A dream made possible with incredible Pennsylvanian artisans from @KingSwingsPlay 🌷

Watching it come together piece by piece felt like more than just building a playset… it felt like building a little world just for them.

And now, seeing it through the kitchen window while I cook… hearing their laughter carry inside… it’s one of those quiet, surreal moments where you realize - this is the dream.

A space made just for them to play, to imagine, to grow… right at home 🤍 

#design #homedecor #girlmom #transformation

items.caption_text:
Confession: This office was overdue for a reset. 🤭

Between launches, meetings, and creative chaos, things piled up fast and this space stopped reflecting the work happening inside it.

With spring around the corner, it felt like the perfect time for a proper clean out.

So today I’m clearing it out, reorganizing everything, and giving the office a refresh that actually feels inspiring again.

A little reset can go a long way. Would you like to see more cleaning and organizing content? #design #homedecor #transformation #springcleaning #asmr

items.caption_text:
Transforming a forgotten corner of my third floor into a dreamy spa sanctuary. 🕊️

Just across from my Pilates studio, I designed a quiet retreat for at-home massages. What was once an empty space now feels like a small resort moment, layered with pieces that tell a story. 

Sometimes the most transformative design isn’t about adding square footage… it’s about seeing the spaces we already have with a little more awe and wonder.

Next for the third floor…the gym of my dreams. Would you like to see? 

#design #interiors #transformation #homedecor #diy

One home. Many traditions. Endless reasons to celebrate.

Our daughters are growing up knowing they don’t have to choose between the parts of their story. They get to honor all of it.

And that’s exactly the way we like it. 🤍 

#ramadan #christmas #eid #multicultural #mixedcouple
